title: Create item in new board when a specific item is assigned
excerpt:
I have a template board that outlines all the things that need to be done when a sale is completed.  One of these items is to create a photobook gift. 
I have a separate board to track all the photobooks that need to be …

posts.author: sugarteam (Martin Wales)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a template board that outlines all the things that need to be done when a sale is completed. One of these items is to create a photobook gift.

I have a separate board to track all the photobooks that need to be made. Is there any way to use automations to create a new item in the photobook board when the first item is assigned to me?

Thanks

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, @sugarteam - Welcome to the community! Yes, you can do this with a custom automation. The overall flow will look like this - (234) Monday Apps, Solution...

posts.author: sugarteam (Martin Wales)
posts.cookedHtml: This will trigger for any item that is assigned to me on the board though correct?

posts.author: sugarteam (Martin Wales)
posts.cookedHtml: This will trigger for any item that is assigned to me on the board though correct?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @sugarteam - Yes, as written it would trigger for anything assigned to you. However, if you only want to trigger it for some items, then you can combine a status column in the Automation (When a Person is assigned AND Status is X, then…)

posts.author: josuexvolt (Josh Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’m Josh Cruz, a Project Manager at DeltaPMO. We’re a project management consultancy firm and proud partners with Monday.com.

Guess what? We have joined forces with another innovative company and we are currently developing a brand new app for Monday.com. This app is designed to cater to your needs with a variety of recipes, actions, and triggers.

Imagine this: “If item A changes, item B changes too!” That’s the core workflow of our app.

We’d love to hear your thoughts on this upcoming app. Do you think it could be a game-changer for Monday.com users like you? Could it solve your problems or boost your workflows?

We’ve attached some screenshots below to give you a sneak peek of an example recipe and how it would appear in our app. Your feedback would mean the world to us.

And hey, if you’re as excited as we are and want to be one of the first to try it out, you can sign up HERE for our waitlist and get early access.

Looking forward to see some replies!

Best Wishes, Josh Cruz
